verification_command passed: >-
rationale: status: already_complete
reason: >-
  All deliverables for fizeau-1bbe2973 were produced in the prior attempt
  (commit 544d4b1d, merged in d4f591d2). The working tree is clean with
  nothing to commit. Both required artifacts exist and satisfy all 10 ACs:

  1. scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml
     Machine-readable lane/resource specification with all four phases
     (canary, local-qwen, sonnet-comparison, gpt-comparison), all 9 lane
     definitions with FIZEAU_* env pins, 3 comparison groups, 4 resource
     groups, resume_policy, metrics schema, and profile_inventory.

  2. docs/research/terminalbench-2-1-sweep-plan-2026-05-07.md
     Human-readable companion with rationale, comparison-group tables,
     equivalence classification, invalid-run classification, resource-group
     concurrency tables, resume semantics, and profile inventory.

  AC evidence:
  - AC1 (4 phases): both files contain canary/local-qwen/sonnet-comparison/gpt-comparison
  - AC2 (comparison groups): cg-local-qwen-provider-quant, cg-sonnet-harness-fiz, cg-gpt-harness-fiz
  - AC3 (local qwen providers): vidar-omlx, bragi-lmstudio, bragi-club-vllm each have
    model_family, model_id, quant_label, provider_surface, endpoint, resource_group
  - AC4 (FIZEAU_* pins): fizeau_env block per lane with exact values; lane_type
    distinguishes fiz_harness_pinned from fiz_provider_native
  - AC5 (equivalence): equivalence + equivalence_note on each comparison_group;
    Equivalence Classification table in markdown states no true same-model controls
  - AC6 (concurrency): local rg max_concurrency=1; rg-openrouter has rate/budget caps
  - AC7 (resume): resume_policy.skip_statuses, retry_statuses, force_rerun=false
  - AC8 (metrics): per_run and per_cell metrics blocks covering all required fields
  - AC9 (profiles): existing_reusable (8 profiles) and new_required listed
  - AC10 (no TB-2.0 relabeling): dataset is terminal-bench/terminal-bench-2-1;
    TB-2.0 preservation notice present in both files

verification_command: >-
  rg "terminal-bench/terminal-bench-2-1" scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml docs/research/terminalbench-2-1-sweep-plan-2026-05-07.md > /dev/null &&
  grep -q "approximate_same_family" scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml &&
  grep -q "max_concurrency: 1" scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml &&
  grep -q "force_rerun" scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml &&
  grep -q "effective_cost_per_pass" scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml &&
  grep -q "existing_reusable" scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml &&
  test -f docs/research/terminalbench-2-1-sweep-plan-2026-05-07.md
result_rev=dea3dd4ffccdecce72fd13fffb0c272133e538c5
